name: Texture Assembler
short_description: Texture Assembler - is a tool for quick and easy manipulation of RGBA image channels. For example, it can be used to convert textures between different engines.
detailed_description:
Texture Assembler - is a tool for quick and easy manipulation of RGBA image channels. For example, it can be used to convert textures between different engines. It can:

- Pack different images into single image channels.
- Split image channels into separate images.
It can also process a large batch of images with a single click.
- Pack textures in bulk and also create your own templates.

Supported formats. TGA, BMP, TIFF, JPEG, PNG.
about_the_game:
Texture Assembler - is a tool for quick and easy manipulation of RGBA image channels. For example, it can be used to convert textures between different engines. It can:

- Pack different images into single image channels.
- Split image channels into separate images.
It can also process a large batch of images with a single click.
- Pack textures in bulk and also create your own templates.

Supported formats. TGA, BMP, TIFF, JPEG, PNG.
